description: Grandfathered source files above their surface's nonblank-LOC cap (frontend: src/**.{ts,vue}; rust: src-tauri/**/src/**.rs — higher cap because unit tests live inline). Entries may shrink but not grow; new files above the cap are rejected. Regenerate with `npm run check:loc -- --update`.

src-tauri/src/capture_commands.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 1211->1215: rename retarget on transcript-sidecar moves (Codex PR #46 round 4). 1215->1219: set_capture_config must also preserve the per-vault lists settings object (defaultList/listOrder, the tasks_folder preservation rule extended) — two fields + the invariant comment.

src-tauri/src/transcription.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/capture/src/session.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/core/src/vault_config.rs.reason: Split out of capture_config for the RecordingMode/VaultCaptureConfig types. Crossed the 800 cap when two independent increments both added per-vault fields to the single VaultCaptureConfig entry (struct + Default + vault_entry parse + serialize_vault_entry + round-trip/defensive-parse tests for each): this branch's Task ID settings (task_id_enabled/task_id_property + task_id_property_name resolver, PR #59) and main's document_extract_images toggle (PR #60), merged together. 834->876: the list-lifecycle increment adds a third per-vault field, archivedLists (Vec<String>, read-lenient/write-omit-when-empty, the list_order precedent) — struct field + Default + parse + serialize + a defensive-parse test + the full round-trip test construct. The large inline test module dominates the file; extracting it (or the parse/serialize pair) into a sibling is the next split. Shrink only; split when next touched.

src-tauri/core/src/capture_paths.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched. 835->854: +capture_dir (flat/dated recording-layout helper, beside dated_folder) + its test; splitting this file is disproportionate for the addition.

src-tauri/transcribe/src/model.rs.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-45/GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.

src/stores/capture.ts.reason: Grandfathered hotspot (docs/Gaps.md GAP-47). Shrink only; split when next touched.
